members.name: renderForm
members.description: Renders the form for the list filters.

members.name: onSubmit
members.description: Called when the form is submitted.

members.name: getDefaultConfig
members.description: Returns the default configuration for this component.

members.name: setConfig
members.description: Sets the configuration for the component.

members.name: hasControls
members.description: Returns true if the list has any controls enabled.

members.name: hasControl
members.description: Returns true if the list has a specific control.

members.name: getList
members.description: Returns the parent list component from a given element.

members.name: getControls
members.description: Returns the list of controls assigned to the list.

members.name: getSortOptions
members.description: Returns the different options by which the list items can be sorted.

members.name: getControl
members.description: Returns the control element given its name.

members.name: getSortDefault
members.description: Returns the default sort option value.

members.name: setView
members.description: Sets the view for the list.

members.name: getViewTemplate
members.description: Returns the view template for a given view.

members.name: _selectViewTemplates
members.description: Selects the view templates for the element.

declarations.name: ListView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'list', label: 'List', className: 'listItem--list', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {icon} {image}
{titleContainer}
{children} {tags}
{iconRight} {rhs}` }

declarations.name: ListCompactView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'list-compact', label: 'List Compact', className: 'listItem--compact', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {checkbox}{icon}{image}
{titleContainer}
{children}
{iconRight}
{tags} {nav}
` }

declarations.name: GridView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'grid', label: 'Grid', className: 'listItem--grid', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {icon}
{titleContainer}{image}{tags}
{children}
{iconRight} {rhs}` }

declarations.name: GridCompactView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'grid-compact', label: 'Grid Compact', className: 'listItem--grid-compact', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {icon}
{titleContainer}{image}{tags}
{iconRight} {rhs}` }

declarations.name: ListItemViews
declarations.default: { list: ListView, listCompact: ListCompactView, grid: GridView, gridCompact: GridCompactView }

members.name: getDefaultConfig
members.description: Returns the default config for the component.

parameters.name: memoized
parameters.description: Indicates whether to use the memoized dimensions.

members.name: getViewConfig
members.description: Returns the view configuration for the list item.

members.name: _initializeView
members.description:
Initializes the view filter.
An item can have a view filter that changes the view of the list: grid, list, compact etc...

members.name: onReady
members.description: Returns a promise that must be resolved before the component is ready.

members.name: _onSubmit
members.description: Called when the form is submitted.

members.name: getDefaultConfig
members.description: Returns the default configuration for the list sort component.

members.name: _isItemSelected
members.description: Checks if the item is selected.

members.name: _onSortBySelected
members.description: When a sort option is selected.
